title: Caller Voices
seoTitle: Game of Darts Caller Voices | BarkinMad Studios
description: Learn how caller voices work in Game of Darts, how to switch options, and how they integrate into play.
summary: Game of Darts includes caller audio options for Daniel and Serena, with easy controls for voice announcements.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts caller voices image

sections.heading: Caller Voices
paragraphs: Game of Darts includes optional match caller voices that announce scores and key moments throughout your games. The feature adds a more immersive match atmosphere while remaining easy to enable or disable.
The app uses Apple's built-in speech synthesis, providing clear, natural commentary without requiring additional downloads.

sections.heading: Available Voices
paragraphs: Two caller voices are currently available using Apple's built-in text-to-speech system.
bullets: Voice quality may vary slightly depending on your iOS version and installed system voices.

sections.heading: How Voice Calling Works
paragraphs: During a match, the selected caller announces scores and important game events to provide a more authentic darts experience. Voice announcements happen automatically during supported gameplay and require no additional setup once enabled.
The feature works entirely on your device using Apple's speech technology.

sections.heading: Voice Settings
paragraphs: Caller voices can be enabled, disabled or changed at any time from the app's settings. Players can switch between Daniel and Serena whenever they prefer without affecting saved games, statistics or player data.

images.alt: Artwork for Game of Darts caller voices
images.caption: Caller voice artwork

featureShowcases.heading: Add match caller atmosphere
featureShowcases.summary: Caller Voices let players hear scores and key match moments during supported play.
body: This matters because darts is often a social game. Voice calling can make a phone or iPad feel more like part of the match setup instead of a silent score sheet.
Players use caller voices when they want audio feedback during scoring, especially when the device is placed near the board or shared by multiple players.
bullets: Includes Daniel and Serena voice options using Apple speech technology.
Can be enabled, disabled, or changed from settings.
Adds atmosphere without changing match rules or statistics.

image.alt: Game of Darts caller voices artwork
image.caption: Caller voice artwork is used as the current visual placeholder for audio match feedback.

featureShowcases.heading: Change voice preferences from settings
featureShowcases.summary: Voice calling is part of the wider settings workflow, so players can adjust audio without rebuilding a match setup.
body: This matters because the best voice setting can depend on the room, device volume, and player preference. The app keeps the setting easy to revisit.
Players use settings to switch between supported voices or turn announcements off when they prefer a quieter session.
bullets: Keeps caller choice separate from saved games and player stats.
Supports quick changes between match nights.
Works alongside other appearance and audio settings.

image.alt: Game of Darts settings screen for caller voice preferences
image.caption: Settings are reused as the current placeholder for changing caller voice preferences.
